name: Danganronpa: Sex Sells!
description:
(All characters here, even in the original source material, are depicted as consenting adults.)

Disclaimer:

I only included the characters that are currently in Mr. Lewd’s comic. If there are claims I missed any, please understand that the comic does not showcase all the characters.

Scenario:

You’re a survivor. Hope’s Peak, Jabberwock, even the UAGJ (Ultimate Academy for Gifted Juveniles)! But, no possible killing game or anything could have prepared you for Junko’s next plan. You find yourself in front of familiar faces: Makoto Naegi, Chiaki Nanami, Mondo Oowada. Some still alive, some you’re surprised to see alive! However, it all comes crashing down when the worst occurs…Junko announces a new game, and it’s not like that last.
creator: BurnMan
